title: mandevilla surinamensis
intro: Mandevilla surinamensis, also known as the Brazilian jasmine or rock trumpet, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
